title: PHP Developer
description: “Gaming Together, Wherever You Are!” GamePoint is one of the world's leading social game developers, based in the Netherlands. We create cross-platform games and have continued to satisfy every type of gamer for over 20 years. We’ve continued success with GamePoint Bingo, Royaldice, Cardparty, and Wordtornado to name a few. We aren’t finished there and continue to develop new games and products for young and old alike. We operate thanks to a diverse international team of game, marketing, and community developers from around the world. We are looking for new team members to help us grow and keep players happy. Come play with us! Position Summary – Full Stack Developer As a PHP Developer, you will be coding for 250.000 unique players per day who use our gaming platform. Besides coding for the players, you are also responsible for smooth sailing behind the curtains; everything should work as well as possible. Do you have the nerve to put a piece of code live that will be used over 40 million times daily? Then we are looking for you! Key Responsibilities Working on back-end tools for your future colleagues Work on back-end scripts that process millions of data points Develop API endpoints for new features You work on front-end features that get used by a lot of users Maintain projects, implement new features and fix bugs Migrating legacy systems to the new framework Be a part of the development process of a project from start to finish Work in scrum teams and interact with other teams Work on integrations with companies like Amazon, Apple, and Google. Work with multiple cloud providers. Who you are: You are experienced with PHP 7 and PHP 8. Have experience with Symfony Knowledge of other programming languages would be preferred. Knowledge of MySQL (MariaDB). You are skilled with markup and interface languages (HTML, CSS (Sass), JavaScript (EcmaScript 6+). You have experience with React / VueJS / Angular or other front-end framework. At least 4 years of expertise in a similar position. You like to work in a team that likes to have fun, but works very hard to get every job done on time! in a team that likes to have fun, but works very hard to get every job done on time! Interested? Are you interested in this position? I am happy to tell you more about the job, the department, and the company in general! Feel free to contact Oleksandr Maistruk (Corporate Recruiter) at omaistruk@gamepoint.com or by phone: +31 6 12 21 89 73 Want to Learn More about GamePoint? See for more info information on our corporate Website: www.gamepoint.biz

title: Backend Developer
description: *This is a fully REMOTE position* **Only full-time position is available.** **USD indexed salary.** About Us Throughout last year, Scorp Inc. has made a big leap and reached over 100 million users with over 10 mobile products! We continue to grow and develop new social apps. As our userbase grows, there comes the challenge of scaling. With this challenge, we've recently started the search for amazing people to extend our team. We're looking for engineers who are excited about the challenge of building and scaling systems that serve information 24/7 for MILLIONS of daily active users worldwide. We present you the opportunity to become a part of our talented team and have direct access to work on large-scale systems that reach millions of people, daily. If you enjoy dealing with large-scale problems, ambitious to solve challenging problems and want your work to reach a massive global audience, you are an ideal candidate for our team. Requirements: A reputable college degree in Computer Engineering, CS or Mathematics Min 5+ years' experience in backend development Motivated to create stable and scalable projects with a team Experience in an Agile development environment Experience in SQL, NoSQL, and in-memory database systems Experience in backend services and distributed systems Nice to haves (not required but a plus): Python, Node.js Familiarity with some frontend technologies. Why Scorp Inc.? 🚀 Join Our Team, Enjoy the Perks! 🌟 We’re not just a company—we’re a community that values growth and happiness! Here’s what you can look forward to when you join us: 🏡 Remote Work Option – Enjoy flexibility and comfort! 💰 USD-Indexed Salary 🌎 Being a Part of a Hyper-Growth Global Startup – Build the future with a dynamic team! 🚀 Endless Self-Improvement Opportunities for Managing High-Scale Problems – We’re building large-scale systems that used by millions! Keep learning and evolving! 🌍 Multicultural Work Environment – Be inspired by diverse perspectives! 🌟 Contribute to Innovative Local & Global Projects – Grow both personally and professionally while making an impact! 📚 Education Budget – We invest in your continuous learning and development. 🧘 ♂️ Meditopia: PT, Dietitian & Therapy Support – Take care of both body and mind! 🍽️ Meal Allowance – Enjoy delicious breaks on us! 🎯 Seamless Onboarding Process with a Scorpion Buddy: A Warm Welcome & Smooth Transition! 🎉 Social clubs, celebrations, and events to help you balance work and fun. Join us and grow together! 💼🚀 💼 Our Interview Process 📝 HR Interview – We get to know you and your career goals better. 🧠 Case Study – A real challenge awaits where you can showcase your skills! 💻 Technical Interview – We assess your technical expertise and experience with our team. At the same time, it’s also a great chance for you to get a feel for how we work and what kind of teammates you’ll be collaborating with. 🎭 VP Culture Fit Interview – We explore the alignment of our values and work culture together. 🎉 Offer Stage – Congratulations! You're now ready to become a part of our team. LinkedIN üzerinden elektronik olarak ileteceğiniz kişisel bilgileriniz, 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ve ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde, Scorp tarafından yalnızca Şirketimizden talep ettiğiniz hizmetlerin sunulabilmesi ve bu hizmetlerin sürekliliğinin sağlanması amaçlarıyla saklanabilecek, işlenebilecek ve verilen servisin gerektirdiği hallerde yurtiçinde ve yurtdışında yerleşik 3. kişilerle paylaşılabilecek olup, kişisel verileriniz hiçbir şekilde hukuka ve dürüstlük kuralına aykırı şekilde başkaları ile paylaşılmayacak ve işleme sebebi dışında başka amaçlarla kullanılmayacaktır. Kişisel verileriniz yalnızca işleme amacının gerekli kıldığı süre boyunca saklanacak olup talebiniz üzerine silinecek veya imha edilecektir. Bu işe başvurarak, özgeçmişinizin veri tabanımızda yer almasını kabul etmiş olduğunuzu bildirmek isteriz.

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE Jotform is seeking a Senior PHP Developer in our Ankara office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Hacettepe University Teknokent. As a rapidly growing company we are hiring for similar positions continuously and once an opportunity matches with your qualifications, we will contact you immediately. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience 5+ year experience building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Software Engineer (React Native)
description: iyzico iyzico was founded in 2013 to provide online payment services and artificial intelligence-based payment technologies to businesses of various sizes in the world of e-commerce. By making the complex payment processes simple through its easy and secure platform, iyzico had achieved significant successes through supporting thousands of businesses in digitalization and was acquired by the global payment systems giant PayU in 2019. With such a robust structure, iyzico is operating on the principle of democratizing financial services and making them accessible for everyone alongside the services it provides to businesses. Through iyzico Buyer Protection, consumers’ concerns regarding shopping online are resolved and better experiences are enabled. Control is handed back to the consumers by 24/7 live support through the iyzico mobile app and convenience in cancellation/returns processes. To this date, more than 2 million consumers shopped online under the security provided by iyzico Buyer Protection and this number is increasing daily. Via pay with iyzico, which is a blended payment solution, millions of consumers who do not use banking can safely shop online under the belt of iyzico Buyer Protection. iyzico continues to simplify online shopping for both consumers and sellers through the simple, accessible, and innovative technologies it developed. Main Responsibilities Develop scalable, high-volume performing, and reliable user-centric mobile applications that operate 24x7, Engage with product managers, UX Experts, and business stakeholders to analyze requirements, develop ideas, and design solutions, Plan implementation and rollout system changes that meet requirements for functionality, performance, scalability, reliability, and adherence to development goals and principles, Make technical design decisions independently, Provide coding expertise and functional/technical support to other team members and encourage engineering best practices in the team and the larger department, Qualifications & Experience BSc degree in Computer Science or related degree, Strong knowledge of data structures, algorithms, and software development principles, Demonstrated knowledge of all phases of the product lifecycle, Eagerness for quality and continuous improvement of processes, React Native & GraphQL knowledge is a big plus, Experience working with modern mobile standards and technologies and can apply them to build fully responsive mobile apps, Experience in software engineering best practices for the full software development life cycle, including agile development, coding standards, code reviews, build processes, testing, and maintenance, Good understanding of API services with which the application needs to integrate, Strong understanding of UI/UX best practices and considerations, Can-do attitude and a willingness to take ownership of problems, What We Offer A culture of continuous development: conferences, in-house events to stay up-to-date on current trends and technology. (Everyone’s encouraged to get on the stage and share expertise with teammates and the community) Online Training Platform (Free access to Udemy, Harvard ManageMentor, Getabstract, etc.) Freedom under responsibility is our common mindset. That’s how we designed our flexible working model called iyzico Homequarters. Our headquarter is in Altunizade. Meal & Internet Allowance Transportation Allowance A gift voucher to meet tech needs and ergonomic workspace at home Macbook (and monitor if needed) Employee support program: free psychological counseling, legal advice, financial advice etc. Private health insurance 1 day birthday leave An iyzicoMate is assigned to help you with anything you may need on your onboardingA detailed orientation program designed for you to fully grasp the iyzico culture

title: PHP Geliştirici
description: 🚀 Next.js & Laravel Geliştirici Arıyoruz! Esenler Giyimkent’te bulunan ofisimizde, tam zamanlı çalışacak ve frontend & backend süreçlerinde aktif rol alacak ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. ! GİYİMKENTTEKİ OFİSİMİZE GELEMEYECEK, ZORLANACAK OLAN KİŞİLER LÜTFEN BAŞVURU YAPMASIN ! ⭐ Aranan Nitelikler • Next.js ile frontend geliştirme konusunda deneyimli • PHP ve Laravel ile backend geliştirme bilgisine sahip • API geliştirme ve frontend ile entegrasyon süreçlerine hakim • MySQL veya benzeri veritabanlarıyla çalışma deneyimi olan • Temiz, sürdürülebilir ve okunabilir kod yazma alışkanlığı bulunan ⭐ Tercih Sebepleri • Full stack projelerde deneyim sahibi • Tailwind CSS veya benzeri framework’lerle çalışma tecrübesi • Performans ve optimizasyon konularında bilgi sahibi • SaaS veya multi-tenant sistemlerde deneyim 🎯 Sorumluluklar • Mevcut projelerin frontend ve backend geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak • Yeni özellikler geliştirmek ve mevcut sistemleri iyileştirmek • API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerini yürütmek • Kod kalitesi ve performans odaklı çalışmak 📍 Çalışma Şekli • Esenler Giyimkent ofisinde tam zamanlı çalışma • Uzun vadeli ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz 👉 Başvuru ve detaylar için bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.

title: Full Stack Developer Leader & AI Developer Leader
description: Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun. Yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde uçtan uca (Full-Stack) proje teslim etmiş ve teknik sorumluluk almış. Teknik Nitelikler İleri Seviye Flutter & Dart: Mevcut mobil uygulamamızı mimari düzeyde devralacak, performansı optimize edecek ve yeni nesil özellikleri sıfırdan inşa edebilecek düzeyde uzmanlık. Endüstriyel Web Scraping: Büyük ölçekli emlak platformlarından (sahibinden.com vb.) veri kazıma süreçlerini yönetebilen; proxy, captcha ve anti-bot sistemlerini aşma konusunda ileri derece deneyim (Python veya Node.js). n8n ile İş Akışı Otomasyonu: CRM, veritabanı ve AI araçlarını n8n üzerinden birbirine bağlayan, hatasız ve ölçeklenebilir otomasyon mimarileri kurma yeteneği. Tercih Sebebi Yetkinlikler Backend & Mimari: Node.js (tercihen NestJS) ve PostgreSQL/NoSQL veritabanı yönetiminde tecrübe. AI Video & Image Pipeline: Veo, Nano Banana, Midjourney veya Stable Diffusion gibi üretken yapay zeka araçlarını API seviyesinde iş süreçlerine entegre edebilme. Veri Analizi: Kazınan ham verileri işleyerek "fiyat/zaman" tahmini yapan algoritmalar geliştirme becerisi. UI/UX Vizyonu: Geliştirilen arayüzlerin profesyonel, modern ve kullanıcıya güven veren bir estetiğe sahip olmasını sağlayacak görsel duyarlılık. Sorumluluklar Flutter tabanlı mobil uygulamamızın tüm teknik sorumluluğunu ve geliştirme süreçlerini üstlenmek. Günlük veri kazıma operasyonlarını tamamen otomomatize etmek, takibini yapmak ve veri sağlığını korumak. Yapay zeka destekli otomatik video ve görsel içerik üretim hatları kurmak ve manuel oluşturma sürecinde yer almak. Pazarlama ve operasyon süreçlerini yapay zeka ajanları ile otonom hale getirerek verimliliği artırmak. Kariyer Gelişimi ve Gelecek Vizyonu PropTech Dönüşümünün Öncüsü: Gayrimenkul teknolojileri dünyasında yapay zekayı sadece bir araç olarak değil, bir iş modeli olarak kullanan ekibin teknik lideri olacaksınız. Stratejik Yetki: Kendi mimarinizi kurgulayabileceğiniz, yazılım ve kreatifi aynı masada birleştirebileceğiniz, fikirlerinizin doğrudan iş sonuçlarına dönüştüğü bir çalışma ortamı sunuyoruz. Yaratıcılığın kodla birleştiği, yapay zekanın gücüyle gayrimenkul dünyasını yeniden inşa ettiğimiz bu yolculukta, bizimle birlikte parlamak ister misiniz? Heyecanımıza ortak olacak ve vizyonumuzu bir mühendis titizliğiyle geliştirecek yeni yol arkadaşımızı sabırsızlıkla bekliyoruz
